questions.question: Event произошёл в 10:00:00 (event_time), но прибыл в Flink в 10:00:15 (processing_time). Tumbling window [10:00-10:01]. Какое time semantics корректно включит event в окно?

options.text: Processing time — event обработан в 10:00:15, попадёт в [10:00-10:01]
Event time — event произошёл в 10:00:00, попадёт в [10:00-10:01] независимо от задержки. Processing time зависит от network delays и может быть unreliable
Event time не поддерживается в Flink

questions.explanation: Event time = when event happened (embedded in data). Processing time = when system processes it (variable due to delays). For analytics: always event time. If event arrived at 10:05:00 (extreme delay), processing time would put it in [10:05-10:06] window → WRONG. Event time correctly puts it in [10:00-10:01].

questions.question: Flink job с checkpoint interval = 60 sec. Job crashes после 45 sec of processing. Сколько данных будет reprocessed при recovery?

options.text: ~45 секунд данных: recovery восстанавливает state от последнего checkpoint (60 sec ago) и replays ~45 sec of events from Kafka offsets

questions.explanation: Checkpoint saves state + Kafka offsets every 60 sec. Crash after 45 sec → restore last checkpoint (state as of 45 sec ago). Replay ~45 sec of events from Kafka (idempotent processing). Result: exactly-once semantics preserved. Trade-off: more frequent checkpoints = less reprocessing but more overhead.
